{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Gardeners' quarters
| introduced = Of Darkness and Dawn
}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Gardeners' quarters]] have a steep flight of stairs leading down to the docks.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c3">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
